name: power-apps-marketplace
description: Marketplace listing for the Power Apps Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: power-apps
plugins.description: Create and manage Power Apps code apps using React and Vite. Includes skills for scaffolding, deploying, and connecting to Power Platform services.

skills.name: create-power-app
skills.description: Scaffold, build, and deploy a new Power Apps code app

skills.name: deploy
skills.description: Build and deploy an existing Power Apps code app to Power Platform

skills.name: add-datasource
skills.description: Router skill that asks what to add, then delegates to the appropriate connector skill

skills.name: add-dataverse
skills.description: Add Dataverse tables with generated TypeScript models and services

skills.name: add-sharepoint
skills.description: Add SharePoint Online connector for lists and document management

skills.name: add-teams
skills.description: Add Microsoft Teams connector for messaging and channel integration

skills.name: add-excel
skills.description: Add Excel Online (Business) connector for reading and writing workbook data

skills.name: add-onedrive
skills.description: Add OneDrive for Business connector for file management

skills.name: add-office365
skills.description: Add Office 365 Outlook connector for calendar, email, and contacts

skills.name: add-azuredevops
skills.description: Add Azure DevOps connector for work items, pipelines, and repos

skills.name: add-connector
skills.description: Add any other Power Platform connector

skills.name: list-connections
skills.description: List Power Platform connections in the current environment
